promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong bounded ultra-lane sims reduction after the ultra2 hidden-scope pass and because the parent batch already isolates the full-stack seam cleanly.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the full-stack shell, the local-only evidence-admission split, the mixed axis0_ab record contract, the Berry-flux sign-symmetry versus exact-magnitude seam, the branch-specific scale split with Se-centered Stage16 concentration, and the raw-order boundary to the ultra sweep family.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The sims evidence-boundary batch was used for the nearest catalog/evidence separation packet, the ultra2 A2-mid batch was used for the nearest ultra-shell and expansion-boundary packet, and the Stage16 boundary batch was used for the nearest local-only admission split packet for a multi-layer family.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because this pass ends at the ultra sweep boundary instead of absorbing the next family.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over fresh raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent ultra4 full-stack batch plus the existing sims evidence-boundary, ultra2 boundary, and Stage16 boundary A2-mid anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable full-stack shell, mixed-record, geometry, scale-split, and next-family-boundary packets for this pass.

candidate_items.name: ULTRA4_FULL_STACK_SHELL_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest full-stack family-identity claim before the internal seams are split further.

candidate_items.name: LOCAL_ULTRA4_SIM_ID_WITHOUT_REPOTOP_ADMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest compression of the parent batch's main evidence contradiction.

candidate_items.name: AXIS0_AB_BASELINE_DELTA_MIXED_RECORD_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the sharpest contract seam in the parent batch in a smaller reusable packet.

candidate_items.name: BERRY_FLUX_SIGN_SYMMETRY_WITH_NONEXACT_MAGNITUDE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's clearest geometry-facing contradiction packet without collapsing it into exact quantization.

candidate_items.name: BRANCH_SPECIFIC_SCALE_SPLIT_WITH_SE_CENTERED_STAGE16_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest anti-flattening packet across the inner branches of the full-stack shell.

candidate_items.name: ULTRA_SWEEP_NEXT_FAMILY_NONMERGE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest next-family boundary packet in the parent batch while keeping the ultra sweep outside the current bounded family.

quarantined_items.name: CATALOG_PLUS_LOCAL_WRITER_AS_REPOTOP_EVIDENCE_STATUS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Local writer presence and catalog visibility are both weaker than repo-top admission and would erase the parent's zero-match evidence state.

quarantined_items.name: AXIS0_AB_AS_ONE_UNIFORM_RECORD_CONTRACT
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: One branch container is weaker than one record contract and would erase the baseline-versus-delta seam preserved by the parent batch.

quarantined_items.name: BERRY_FLUX_AS_EXACTLY_QUANTIZED_FROM_THIS_SURFACE_ALONE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves near-2pi magnitude rather than exact equality, so sign symmetry is stronger than exact quantization here.

quarantined_items.name: ONE_UNIFORM_ULTRA4_EFFECT_SCALE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves much larger Axis0 AB deltas alongside smaller Stage16 deltas rather than one shared scale.

quarantined_items.name: ULTRA_SWEEP_AS_SAME_BOUNDED_FAMILY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Adjacency and shared strip direction are weaker than bounded-family identity and would erase the dropped geometry and Axis12 boundary markers preserved by the parent batch.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable ultra4 packets: full-stack shell identity, local-only admission split, mixed axis0_ab record contract, Berry-flux symmetry with nonexact magnitude, branch-specific scale split with Se-centered Stage16 concentration, and the ultra sweep boundary.

They preserve ultra4 as a contradiction-rich full-stack bundle without letting catalog visibility, branch container shape, or raw adjacency flatten it into one clean evidence status or one merged ultra family.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later ultra-family and geometry-facing work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain evidence-strength overreads, record-contract overreads, geometry overreads, scale-flattening overreads, or family-merge overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used the sims evidence-boundary, ultra2 boundary, and Stage16 boundary A2-mid batches as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded ultra4 full-stack contract and boundary reduction pass.
